nodes.context: A clan of the 'Ndrangheta based in Locri, Calabria, involved in drug trafficking and public works contracts.
A criminal and mafia-type organization in Calabria, Italy.
A clan allied with the Cataldo 'ndrina, involved in the feud with the Cordì 'ndrina.
A clan from Locri, rival of the Cataldo 'ndrina, involved in a long blood feud.
A clan from Reggio Calabria, allied with the Cataldo 'ndrina in the First 'Ndrangheta war.
A Sicilian Mafia clan involved in cocaine trafficking with the Cataldo 'ndrina.
A clan from Platì involved in a joint cocaine trafficking venture with the Cataldo 'ndrina.
A clan from Gioiosa Ionica involved in a joint cocaine trafficking venture with the Cataldo 'ndrina.
A clan from Africo involved in a joint cocaine trafficking venture with the Cataldo 'ndrina.
A clan from Gioiosa Ionica involved in a joint cocaine trafficking venture with the Cataldo 'ndrina.
A clan from Rosarno involved in a joint cocaine trafficking venture with the Cataldo 'ndrina.
A clan allied with the Cataldo 'ndrina, involved in drug trafficking.
A clan allied with the Cataldo 'ndrina, involved in drug trafficking.

edges.context: The Cataldo 'ndrina is a clan of the 'Ndrangheta.
The Cataldo clan is allied with the Marafioti family.
The Cataldo clan has a long blood feud with the Cordì 'ndrina since the end of the 1960s.
In 2010, the Cordì and Cataldo clans signed a peace and formed a strong alliance for joint crime management.
The Cataldos allied with the De Stefano 'ndrina in the First 'Ndrangheta war in the 1970s.
The Cataldo clan was involved in cocaine trafficking from Colombia with the Sicilian Cuntrera-Caruana Mafia clan.
The Cataldo clan was part of a joint venture of 'Ndrangheta clans in cocaine trafficking including the Barbaro 'ndrina.
The Cataldo clan was part of a joint venture of 'Ndrangheta clans in cocaine trafficking including the Ierinò 'ndrina.
The Cataldo clan was part of a joint venture of 'Ndrangheta clans in cocaine trafficking including the Morabito 'ndrina.
The Cataldo clan was part of a joint venture of 'Ndrangheta clans in cocaine trafficking including the Mazzaferro 'ndrina.
The Cataldo clan was part of a joint venture of 'Ndrangheta clans in cocaine trafficking including the Pesce 'ndrina.
The Cataldo clan was allied with the Sergi 'ndrina in drug trafficking.
The Cataldo clan was allied with the Marando 'ndrina in drug trafficking.
